title: Golden Piggy Charm
description: A curio that makes Piglins neutral
body:
This mod adds a Curios charm which prevents Piglins from attacking the player unprovoked, as if the player was wearing golden armor.
![my man](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ll5WwJ5g/images/eaaeab1d2543bbb945a3e5ab5dbee4daa0c6f4d8.jpeg)
 



Crafting recipe:
![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ll5WwJ5g/images/12c4063ab92d5d303f244156c09cfa44beb4628e_350.webp)

Any type of Gold Ore works.
